title: Creamy Feta Pasta Bake
description: A rich and satisfying Italian-inspired pasta dish featuring orecchiette, feta cheese, and a creamy sauce.
instructions: Cook the orecchiette pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add the crumbled feta cheese and cook, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked pasta, feta mixture, ricotta cheese, and parmesan cheese. Stir until well combined.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and dot the top with the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
